data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Simple cancellation (24-hour notice)', which is explicitly stated in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the implementation of this cancellation policy or how it operates in practice. The evidence primarily focuses on successful bookings without addressing the cancellation process, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of the simple cancellation policy with 24-hour notice.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
